info.name: Hercules DJControl Inpulse 300mk2 - Custom 4 deck - Copy
info.author: DJ Phatso for Hercules Technical Support
info.description: MIDI Preset for Hercules DJControl Inpulse 300mk2

control.description: Jog Wheel Shift Touch Deck A
Jog Wheel Shift Touch Deck B
SHIFT + LOAD A button - Load to Deck 3
SHIFT + LOAD B button - Load to Deck 4

output.description: FX1 is active on Deck A
FX1 is active on Deck B
FX2 is active on Deck A
FX2 is active on Deck B
FX3 is active on Deck A
FX3 is active on Deck A
FX4 is active on Deck A
FX4 is active on Deck B
